source: MNPD Police Precinct Boundaries (official polygon layer, 9 precincts)
license: not stated on the item — attributed to Metro Nashville Police Department / Nashville Open Data
method: spatial join — the crime file names no precinct (Zone/RPA are numeric and ~61% null); every deduplicated incident with published coordinates is assigned by point-in-polygon of MNPD's REAL published coordinates (rounded to ~2–3 decimals by the source — block-ish grain, disclosed) into the 9 official Police Precinct Boundaries polygons (interior rings handled). Incidents without usable coordinates are counted citywide and disclosed as unplaced, never guessed onto the map.
